programme.title: Magnum P.I.
programme.desc: As Magnum, Higgins and TC try to pull one over on a Customs agent to get Higgins a green card, armed gunmen suddenly storm the federal building and start taking hostages.

programme.title: Magnum P.I.
programme.desc: Magnum and Higgins help a mixed martial arts fighter who is being pressured by a gang to throw an illegal fight; Kumu is arrested for stealing an artifact from a collector that should be returned to its original resting place.

programme.title: Magnum P.I.
programme.desc: As a major hurricane hits the island, Magnum and his friends find shelter inside La Mariana, along with two armed killers who are also escaping the dangerous storm; Rick must confess to TC that he let the insurance lapse on the bar.

programme.title: Magnum P.I.
programme.desc: When a wealthy man hires Magnum and Higgins to find his missing wife, they are stunned when a tragedy occurs as a result of their investigation; Kumu is suspicious of her stepdaughter's boyfriend.

programme.title: Magnum P.I.
programme.desc: When an overenthusiastic neighborhood watch group asks Magnum and Higgins to investigate a shady character living on their block, they are shocked to find that they may have inadvertently stumbled upon a serial killer on the loose.

programme.title: Magnum P.I.
programme.desc: When a young man in need of immediate emergency surgery goes missing with a bullet lodged in his chest, Ethan asks Magnum and Higgins to find him before it's too late; TC talks to a military recruit who may be enlisting for the wrong reasons.

programme.title: Magnum P.I.
programme.desc: When Higgins is abducted, Magnum discovers it's retaliation related to one of his first cases; Magnum, Rick and TC must break out an ex-client from prison in order to save her.

programme.title: Conan the Barbarian
programme.desc: A warrior sets off to get his revenge on the evil warlord who attacked his village and murdered his father.

programme.title: The Legend of Hercules
programme.desc: Banished by the king, Hercules harnesses his powers and gathers an army to fight his way back to his kingdom.

programme.title: I, Frankenstein
programme.desc: Dr. Frankenstein's creature finds himself in the middle of a war, holding the key that could destroy humankind

programme.title: The Last Witch Hunter
programme.desc: The last witch hunter is all that stands between humanity and the most horrifying witches in history.

programme.title: The Contract
programme.desc: Frank Carden (Morgan Freeman), one of the world's greatest assassins, is handed a lucrative contract to kill a highly secretive billionaire. But in a twist of fate, Carden is involved in a car accident during the job, and when his gun is found after he is admitted to a hospital, federal marshals arrest him. Meanwhile, ex-cop Ray Keene (John Cusack) is hiking with his son, Chris (Jamie Anderson), when Carden's cohorts try to spring him from custody, and soon the pair is caught in the crossfire.

programme.title: In Hell
programme.desc: Kyle LeBlanc is an honorable citizen who winds up incarcerated in Russia after he takes revenge on the man who murdered his wife, resulting in the killer's death. Unfortunately for Kyle, he is assigned to a prison that is renowned for its violence. Controlled by a corrupt and sadistic warden, the facility regularly holds brutal fights between inmates. In order to survive in the prison, Kyle must participate in the battles, even as he attempts to retain his humanity.

programme.title: Edison
programme.desc: Ambitious young reporter Pollack (Justin Timberlake) suspects insidious corruption in his town's elite police unit, known as F.R.A.T., and finds a friendly source in Deed (LL Cool J), a dissatisfied member of the squad. With Deed's information and the backing of his publisher, Ashford (Morgan Freeman), and a crusading lawyer, Wallace (Kevin Spacey), Pollack infiltrates the secretive police cabal. He finds himself in over his head, however, when he discovers the true extent of the criminality.

programme.title: Retrograde
programme.desc: Two opposing time travelers are sent back to the present to prevent a global biological disaster from occurring.

programme.title: The Contract
programme.desc: Frank Carden (Morgan Freeman), one of the world's greatest assassins, is handed a lucrative contract to kill a highly secretive billionaire. But in a twist of fate, Carden is involved in a car accident during the job, and when his gun is found after he is admitted to a hospital, federal marshals arrest him. Meanwhile, ex-cop Ray Keene (John Cusack) is hiking with his son, Chris (Jamie Anderson), when Carden's cohorts try to spring him from custody, and soon the pair is caught in the crossfire.

programme.title: The Marksman
programme.desc: A rancher on the Arizona border becomes the unlikely defender of a young Mexican boy desperately fleeing the cartel assassins who've pursued him into the U.S.

programme.title: Honest Thief
programme.desc: Wanting to lead an honest life, a notorious bank robber turns himself in.

programme.title: 99 Homes
programme.desc: A recently unemployed single father struggles to get back his foreclosed home by working for the real estate broker who is the source of his frustration.

programme.title: Sabotage
programme.desc: Members of an elite DEA task force find themselves being taken down one by one after they rob a drug

programme.title: Final Descent
programme.desc: An airliner collides with a light plane just after takeoff, causing its elevators to jam in the full climb position.

programme.title: Final Run
programme.desc: A new, computer controlled train loses control due to an error in the system and speeds out of control while Urich attempts to stop it.

programme.title: The Principal
programme.desc: At the toughest high school in town, the biggest troublemaker is the principal. Edited for TV

programme.title: 30 Minutes Or Less
programme.desc: In the action-comedy 30 Minutes or Less, Nick (Jesse Eisenberg) is a small town pizza delivery guy whose mundane life collides with the big plans of two wanna-be criminal masterminds (Danny McBride and Nick Swardson). The volatile duo kidnaps Nick and forces him to rob a bank. With mere hours to pull off the impossible task, Nick enlists the help of his ex-best friend, Chet (Aziz Ansari). As the clock ticks, the two must deal with the police, hired assassins, flamethrowers, and their own tumultuous relationship.

programme.title: Jack And Jill
programme.desc: A comedy centered on fraternal twins. Adam Sandler plays both Jack and twin sister Jill.

programme.title: Divorce American Style
programme.desc: About a nouveau-riche Los Angeles couple who, after 17 years of marriage, decide to call it quits.

programme.title: In Cold Blood
programme.desc: IN COLD BLOOD dramatizes actual events and people in a realistic, technically well-crafted fashion, based upon Truman Capote s novel. The movie is a faithful docudrama about the real-life mass murder of the Clutter family, which took place in Holcomb, Kansas on November 15, 1959 by two psychopathic killers.

programme.title: Mr. Smith Goes To Washington
programme.desc: James Stewart takes on the powers-that-be in our nations capitol in Frank Capras timeless classic. Nominated for eleven 1939 Oscars, including best picture.

programme.title: The Caine Mutiny
programme.desc: A naval lieutenant is court-martialed for seizing command of a minesweeper from a neurotic commander (Humphrey Bogart).

programme.title: Suburbia
programme.desc: Suburbia is director Penelope Spheeris's study of the Los Angeles punk rock scene in the early 1980s. Evan and his younger brother leave their broken home in an attempt to escape their alcoholic mother. They find family in a group of punks who live as squatters in an abandoned shack by the side of the highway

programme.title: Night Of The Demons
programme.desc: On the night of Halloween, 10 teens decide to go to a party at an abandoned funeral parlor. While starting the party, the teens gather around a big mirror to perform a seance...BIG MISTAKE.

programme.title: Castle Falls
programme.desc: After decades of neglect, Castle Heights Hospital, this symbol of the city's segregated past has been packed with dynamite and is ready to be demolished. No one knows that a gang leader, now in prison, hid the 3 million dollars in cash he stole from his rivals inside the abandoned building. Now, three desperate parties want the money - a blue collared ex-fighter (Adkins) who finds it while working as part of the demolition crew, a prison guard (Lundgren) willing to do anything to pay for his daughter's cancer treatment and a ruthless gang who claim to be the rightful owners. The demolition charges are set, everyone clears out and the Castle is set to fall in 90 minutes. The clock is ticking. Who will find the cash and: will they get out alive?

programme.title: Wish Upon
programme.desc: A teenage girl discovers a box that carries magic powers and a deadly price for using them.

programme.title: Brotherhood Of The Wolf
programme.desc: In 18th-century France, the Chevalier de Fronsac and his Native American friend Mani are sent to the Gevaudan province at the king's behest to investigate the killings of hundreds by a mysterious beast.

programme.title: Drive Angry 3D
programme.desc: John's daughter was murdered, so he escapes hell to rescue his granddaughter, with an FBI agent on his heels.

programme.title: Warhunt
programme.desc: A commander dispatches a team of soldiers on a rescue mission, but they are confronted by a coven of witches.

programme.title: Cell
programme.desc: When a cell phone signal causes apocalyptic chaos, an artist is determined to reunite with his young son.

programme.title: The Crazies
programme.desc: After a plane crash, a toxic virus begins to spread. A couple is quarantined but must fight for survival.

programme.title: 12 To Midnight
programme.desc: A detective gets kicked off the force when the murder of his wife drives him to drink. When a new string of murders seem connected to her death, he soon finds himself squaring off against a killer who appears to be superhuman.

programme.title: Joe Baby
programme.desc: A money collector for a private investigator is hired to track down 10 million dollars stolen in a dodgy real estate deal, opening a complex can of worms.

programme.title: Lone Star Shark 3
programme.desc: Two female survivors join forces to bring down the deadly group responsible for unleashing a hungry shark in a West Texas lake.

programme.title: Her Deadly Game
programme.desc: When her childhood friend Kayla transfers to her college basketball team, Andrea's reunion turns into a nightmare. Kayla, obsessed with being Andrea's one and only best friend, will harm anyone who gets in her way.

programme.title: Reawakening
programme.desc: John and Mary have lived in grief for ten years because their child, Clare, disappeared when she was fourteen. When Clare mysteriously returns, John suspects she's not who she claims to be, plunging the couple into a search for the truth.

programme.title: Code of the Assassins
programme.desc: Trained by the best, a young assassin is assigned his first mission while secretly investigating the cause of his family's massacre years ago. Failing to complete his mission, he becomes a fugitive hunted by the government, rival assassin groups and other shadowy killers.

programme.title: Believer
programme.desc: A low-level drug dealer joins forces with an ambitious cop to bring down a psychotic cartel kingpin.

programme.title: Big Brother
programme.desc: A former soldier is recruited for his toughest mission yet -- teaching a class of teen delinquents. As he kicks his way into their school and home lives, it becomes clear that his unconventional teaching style might be just what they need.

programme.title: God of War
programme.desc: A maverick commander and a young general join forces to battle pirates who pillage small villages in 16th-century China. The violent clash of wits and weapons will ultimately decide who rules the land.

programme.title: Abducted Off the Street: The Carlesha Gaither Story
programme.desc: Carlesha was walking home when she is forced into a car at knifepoint.

programme.title: Abducted By My Teacher: The Elizabeth Thomas Story
programme.desc: 15-year-old Elizabeth Thomas was groomed by married teacher Tad Cummins.

programme.title: Beyond the Headlines: The College Admissions Scandal with Gretchen Carlson
programme.desc: The rich and famous abusing their privilege to get their kids into college

programme.title: Cleveland Abduction
programme.desc: The true story of Michelle Knight, a 21-year-old single mom who was abducted.

programme.title: Abducted Off the Street: The Carlesha Gaither Story
programme.desc: Carlesha was walking home when she is forced into a car at knifepoint.

programme.title: Abducted By My Teacher: The Elizabeth Thomas Story
programme.desc: 15-year-old Elizabeth Thomas was groomed by married teacher Tad Cummins.

programme.title: Love at First Like
programme.desc: A journalist covering the Don Juan of dating apps ends up finding there's more than meets the eye.

programme.title: My Daddy is In Heaven
programme.desc: Becca and Adam Smith along with their 5-year-old daughter Acie are a perfect family until a tragedy strikes

programme.title: Sinkhole
programme.desc: A group of teenagers get trapped in a sink hole and have to fight for their lives.

programme.title: Maternal Instinct
programme.desc: Teen witnesses mother's shooting, hides with a cop, facing danger as they evade the killer together.

programme.title: Hit And Run
programme.desc: A lawyer is riding high after receiving a Not Guilty verdict for her client, but has to look over her shoulder when a woman she meets in a traffic accident is not all she appears to be.

programme.title: Murder Without Motive
programme.desc: Edmund Perry has everything going for him after he graduates with a scholarship to attend Stanford. With his dedication paying off, an encounter with a police officer senselessly ends his life.

programme.title: American Honey
programme.desc: Star (Sasha Lane), an adolescent girl from a troubled home, runs away with a traveling sales crew that drives across the American Midwest selling subscriptions door-to-door. Finding her feet in this gang of teenagers, one of whom is Jake (Shia LaBeouf), she soon gets into the group's lifestyle of hard-partying nights, law-bending days and young love.

programme.title: Falcon Rising
programme.desc: Former Marine John "Falcon" Chapman is a dark anti-hero driven by guilt and suffering from PTSD, who will destroy himself unless given something else to destroy - a useful weapon-of-last-resort for the U.S. State Department.

programme.title: Just Getting Started
programme.desc: Duke Diver is living the high life as the freewheeling manager of a luxurious resort in Palm Springs, Calif. He soon faces competition from Leo, a former military man who likes the same woman that Duke is interested in. When Diver's past suddenly catches up with him, he must put aside his differences and reluctantly team up with Leo to stop whoever is trying to kill him.

programme.title: CODE
programme.desc: Dallas artist MALIK SCHAEFER, also known as CODE, is a rising star in the underground rap scene. Although his checkered past has led him down the wrong road at times, with the help of his best friend, STYLES, Malik is back on the fast-track to success. That is, until he reconnects with the dangerous love of his life, SOPHIA ORTEGA, who threatens to destroy it all. Malik must decide to either follow his heart or live by the code that has served him well for many years: family over everything.

programme.title: Deliveries From Eva
programme.desc: Disgraced music star Reese is surprised to learn that he still has a fan in the form of delivery driver, Eva. The two form an unlikely friendship that begins to sour due to Eva's growing obsession and her struggles with PTSD.

programme.title: We in This Together
programme.desc: Attorney August marries Daisha, a social climber more interested in his bank account than motherhood. To hide her infertility, Daisha secretly adopts 17-year-old "Lil August," sparking an immediate, violent rivalry. While August dismisses the teen’s lethal behavior as "playful," Daisha finds herself trapped in a house with a son who may be a killer. As she plots to conceive a biological heir, a series of dark secrets and "accidents" leave the family’s survival in question.

programme.title: ToxiCity
programme.desc: Corey Spencer, the innovator behind the successful ATLUV dating app, navigates a complex personal life. Despite his app's mission, he struggles with love, further complicated by a child support order. A night out leads him to Sierra, an alluring actress who quickly moves in. Their romance sours as Sierra's past as a dancer and her aggressive jealousy come to light.

programme.title: Broken Harmony
programme.desc: Recording artist Harmony Brown, listens to every suggestion from her record label including changing her sound, changing her look, and even changing the type of music she sang. Yet, her numbers aren’t improving, and she’s on the verge of being released from her contract. Her manager, suggests she returns to Atlanta and meet with a power house music producer to give her a refresh on her sound. However, she’s forced to stay with and reunite with her mother, and address the trauma of her childhood.

programme.title: Abraham Lincoln vs Zombies
programme.desc: As the Civil War rages, President Lincoln undertakes a more daunting task: Destroying the Confederate Undead.

programme.title: The Da Vinci Treasure
programme.desc: A treasure hunter is forced into a deadly race to uncover a Christian relic and history’s greatest treasure.

programme.title: War of the Worlds 2: The Next Wave
programme.desc: The aliens return to complete their plan of human domination, launching a second attack to destroy humanity.

programme.title: Ice Sharks
programme.desc: As scientists study the effects of climate change on sea life, a new breed of shark breaks through.

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.desc: The team arrives at a crazy gun show and Wild West-style bar.

programme.title: Disaster Strike Force
programme.desc: Oahu’s volcanic disaster becomes a global threat.

programme.title: Nightbreed: The Director's Cut (Edited Version)
programme.desc: Boone may be a troubled young man, but his troubles are just beginning. Set up as the fall guy in a string of slasher murders, he decides he'll hide by crossing the threshold that separates us from them and sneak into the forbidden subterranean realm of Midian. Boone will live among the monsters. Includes over 40 minutes of new footage, all mastered in high definition from the original camera negative!

programme.title: Cannibal! The Musical
programme.desc: Cannibal! The Musical is the true story of the only person convicted of cannibalism in America Alfred Packer. The sole survivor of an ill-fated trip to the Colorado Territory, he tells his side of the harrowing tale to news reporter Polly Prye as he awaits his execution. And his story goes like this: While searching for gold and love in the Colorado Territory, he and his companions lost their way and resorted to unthinkable horrors, including toe-tapping songs! Packer and his five wacky mining buddies sing and dance their ways into your heartand then take a bite out of it! Cannibal! The Musical is Oklahoma meets Bloodsucking Freaks. Brought to you by the Troma Team and Trey Parker the Rogers and Hammerstein of Horror!

programme.title: Attack of the Giant Leeches
programme.desc: Massive bloodsucking monsters are at large in this Drive-in schlock classic from producers Roger and Gene Corman. The legendary Yvette Vickers (Attack of the 50-foot Woman) stars along with Jan Shepard, Ken Clark, and some nasty giant leeches! Basically, they're just a bunch of actors in plastic costumes, but director Bernard Kowalski (Hot Car Girl, Night of the Blood Beast) made the most of his small budget. When the Cormans wouldn't hire a crew to push the camera raft while filming water scenes in the Pasadena Arboretum, Kowalski put on a bathing suit and did it himself!

programme.title: The Haunting of Molly Hartley
programme.desc: Molly Hartley hopes that with her mother locked away in a mental ward, she canforget the violence of her familys past and start over. She has found a new life, a new school and a new boyfriend. But when her secret past and haunting nightmares continue, Molly fears she has inherited her mothers psychosis. What she doesnt know is that shes inherited something else a secret far more horrifying than any fate she can imagine and a destiny she cannot avoid.

programme.title: Elvira's Movie Macabre: The Werewolf Of Washington
programme.desc: Elvira presents the 1973 Horror-Comedy The Werewolf of Washington which acts as a political spoof of The Wolf Man.

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: Conjoined twins Eddie and Frank share everything-except personalities. When a doctor offers to separate them, greed, jealousy, and betrayal surface, leading to a darkly ironic twist where the wrong brother pays the ultimate price.

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: A wealthy couple adopts a sickly orphan, promising him a mysterious "secret" when he turns 18. As his health improves, he grows suspicious of their intentions-until a chilling twist reveals a monstrous truth neither expected.

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: Electrician Niles Talbot has been promoted to executioner. When the death penalty is abolished in his state, Niles loses his job. But he decides to become a vigilante, punishing criminals that are released by justice system.

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: Elizabeth kills her second husband for his insurance money. Upon getting rid of the body, she is attacked by an escaped mental patient dressed as Santa Claus. She soon fears that her young daughter may be Santa's next victim.

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: A carnival daredevil is buried alive for his grand finale. He tells the viewers how he had undergone a doctor's experiment to transfer a cat's nine lives to him. He suddenly remembers that he may have miscounted just how many lives he has left.

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: Sylvia Vane is a young, narcissistic prostitute, "sells" her beauty to a voodoo-dabbling pawnbroker so that she can use the money to snag a rich bachelor, Ronnie Price. She soon regrets it when her face begins to unexpectedly age rapidly.

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: Peggy and Charles, newlyweds end up spending the night inside a decrepit mansion after a car accident. Charles plans to kill Peggy for her inheritance, but he soon learns that Peggy's family has a dark past. Peggy is not who she seems to be.

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: An uptight elderly man named Jonas is forced into retirement, and soon discovers his wife Anita's obsession with adopting animals into their home, leading him to use the animals for a hobby of his own.

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: A dying elderly bachelor proposes to his crush, but is rejected for his age. He ends up meeting a discredited doctor who helps him switch bodies. In the end he discovers that his crush's affection comes at a price he cannot afford.

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: Reno Crevice and Sam Forney, a pair of rival gamblers who hate each other with a passion, face off in a series of increasingly dangerous and gruesome games in order to see who will leave town when all is said and done.

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: Land owner woos snobby, and wealthy woman to help finance a development project. He wins her over with a potion from his ex, voodoo priestess, that contains a deadly warning - resulting in an undead Margaret amorously chasing him without end.

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: Richard and Della are invited to a cabin owned by their wealthy former best man, Alan. Richard slowly becomes convinced that Della is having an affair with Alan. After murdering the two of them, Richard realizes just how wrong he was.

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: Stacy and Devlin fall in love. Stacy's fiancée, Mitch sets out to kill Devlin. However, Mitch soon gets a nasty surprise when he discovers Devlin's has a supernatural necklace and proves his love to be strong in the face of death.

programme.desc: "The Clampetts and the Dodgers" - Jed and Jethro go golfing with Leo Durocher, coach of the Los Angeles Dodgers, who wants to recruit Jethro as a pitcher when he sees how well he can throw.

programme.desc: "Jed Pays His Income Tax" - When an IRS agent gets chased away by Granny, Mr. Drysdale tells him the story of how the Clampetts came to be rich and move to Beverly Hills.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Granny's Spring Tonic" - Miss Hathaway's brilliant-but-frumpy bank protegee Gloria is really a sultry gold-digger with eyes for Jed's $34 million, and Jed's just had his annual dose of Granny's spring tonic.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Jed Cuts the Family Tree" - Mrs. Drysdale continues to be forced into doing "practices from the past" by Mrs. Smith-Standish, who discovers that Jed's family is possibly the first to come the country. If so they'd be famous worldwide, but does Jed want that?

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies

programme.desc: "Jed Buys the Freeway" - Henry Jones shows up at the Clampett's, pretends to be an old friend and tries to sell the family the Hollywood Bowl, Griffith Park, and the freeway.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Duke Steals a Wife" - Jed and Duke his dog are both down without a woman in their lives, until they see and pursue a French woman and her poodle that she brought to breed with Mrs. Drysdales dog. Meanwhile Mrs. Drysdale has arranged a "marriage" between the dogs, complete with a decorated bedroom.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Jed Throws a Wingding" - Flatt and Scruggs and their wives come to visit their old sweetheart, but Pearl thinks they're there to propose. Jed throws a wingding for them and the duo play music for the Clampetts.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Elly's Animals" - When Pearl starts selling music lessons, Mrs. Drysdale complains about the noise to the police. Mrs. Drysdale also calls the dog catcher on Duke.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Jed Saves Drysdale's Marriage" - Mrs Drysdale leaves for a health farm saying Mr. Drysdale is "going to have a new wife," while Mr. Drysdale tells Cousin Pearl he'd like her to keep his house. programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Jed's Dilemma" - Grannie and Cousin Pearl are at each other's throats over who's going to take care of cooking and the house, so Jed has to find ways to keep them apart.

Jed didn't count on Mr. Brewster's background in the theater and him making a huge production out of it.

programme.title: Mohawk
programme.desc: Kurt Neumann (The Fly, Rocketship X-M) directed this bawdy tale of a love that was louder than war drums! With a cast that includes Scott Brady, Rita Gam, and Neville Brand, the story takes place on a remote army post where an artist romances a trio of women, just as a vengeful settler turns the army and the local Iroquois tribe against each other. Film buffs might like to know that the cinematography for this feature is by four-time Oscar nominee Karl Struss, who won an Academy Award in 1929 for his work on Sunrise.

programme.title: McLintock

McLaglen (Gunsmoke, The Wild Geese). George Washington McLintock (John Wayne) is the wealthiest man in his territory who utilizes his power and influence to maintain order between farmers, ranchers, Indians, corrupt government officials, and his own family! McLintock is McNificent!

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: This week is a good one, can you feel the energy? Sit still, just look at me and try and feel the energy, because I can tell you, the atmosphere here is electric, it’s explosive, there is a pure elemental force going through these athletes' veins. I’m shaking because it’s Poland, it’s powerful, it’s strongman champions league, and you know what I'm going to say, get ready because it’s about to get heavy.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: SCL Poland part 2 - Who will win the title in Poland and take 25 points for the world ranking. It is very exciting on the top, in part 1 between Poland and Latvia. Another great episode with super strongman events such as: Bag Toss Medley, Log Lift Reps and the Powerstairs. Also an interview with Mateusz Kieloszkowski, the all time favorite champion from Poland.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: It’s time to show our strength and gain respect from the gods of Olympus. Our gladiators have many events set out by no other than Hercules himself. The coliseum is ready here on this mythological island of Cyprus, so we have landed in Limassol were again 12 Top Strongmen are battling for the title and ranking points.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: The only and official world championship Truckpulling for its 10th year, again at the Strongman Champions league. With the 3 times Worldchampion Kelvin de Ruiter – defending his title. This championship has trucks in all shapes and sizes which is a lot like our athletes, there all different pay loads, but does the biggest win or is it the strongest.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: Years and years of determination has brought us here today, when all the walls felt like they were caving in perseverance. When their bodies were screaming, hurting, shouting stop, beneath. These are the things which make up a man, these are the things that bring you world finalists. This episode they fight for the greatest title of all, they fight to put their names in the history books forever.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: Part 2 of the World Finals of the Strongman Champions League tour 2023 at the Sarajevo Centar Skenderija in Bosnia. 3 Events was done already and amazing results have been set. Who will be the new World champion? Find out here, who, after 16 stages, will be crowned World Champion 2023.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: After 10 years there is another edition of THE ICEMAN in minus 25 degrees and snow, and it is also the first stage in the MLO Strongman Champions League. With a new World champion from South Africa, Rayno Nel, it will be a challenging year for all the athletes to win the title again after 1 full year. But now they can win one very exceptional title, which is the SCL ICEMAN!

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: A battle in the beautiful Caribbean Islands. Over 2 days and more than 10,000 spectators expected like previous editions. The cold temperature from the Iceman is changed in 35 degrees hot Martinique. Watch who gets the title in Martinique, events include: Truck Pull, Deadlift, Hercules Hold, Log Lift, and Arm Over Arm Pull.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Kicking off Thanksgiving week, Clinton Kelly prepares a seasonal Delicata Squash Salad with goat cheese and pepitas. programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: It's Thanksgiving Eve, and Carla Hall takes the stress out of holiday cooking with her fast and flavorful Turkey Scallopini topped with a Cranberry Gastrique. The hosts share their best organizational tips, including Michael's famous oven grid and platter sticky notes. The trio also swaps hilarious stories about cooking under pressure and celebrity encounters.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: It's the Friday after Thanksgiving, and Chewed Up is all about transforming leftovers into brand-new masterpieces. Carla Hall whips up a decadent Ice Cream Pecan Pie using leftover pie slices, while Michael Symon cooks a savory Stuffing Frittata. The hosts confess their favorite late-night leftover habits, debate mayonnaise brands, and share wild stories about flying with pets.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: In this Fan Fridge episode, Michael Symon battles a stubborn blender to create a Whipped Cottage Cheese Dip with crispy mortadella chips. The crew embraces the pre-holiday scramble, sharing funny stories about morning commutes and paper cuts.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: During "holiday reset week," Clinton Kelly bakes a festive Stromboli Wreath in a bundt pan. The hosts discuss their vastly different childhoods, play "Holiday Do or Don't," and Michael shares a hilariously horrifying mix-up involving the Hotel Chelsea in New York.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Special guest Liz Symon joins the kitchen to bake her foolproof Orange Olive Oil Cake. While she bakes, Liz and Michael laugh off a viral AI rumor that they divorced, reveal their morning Wordle routines, and recall a disastrous early date involving bad crab stuffed shells.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Guest Amy Sedaris joins the crew for a festive break! programme.title: Chewed Up

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Clinton Kelly bakes an impressive yet simple "Invisible Apple Cake" loaded with thinly sliced apples, cinnamon, and nutmeg. The crew discusses the dangers of mandolins, Michael gets emotional recalling a surprise restaurant visit, and they debate holiday party etiquette.

programme.title: Chewed Up

programme.title: Chewed Up

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: In a festive Cookie Swap episode, Clinton Kelly makes Butter Cookies dipped in chocolate, Carla Hall bakes Molasses Lemon Crinkle Cookies, and Michael Symon shares his grandmother's beloved Pinoli Cookies. programme.title: Behind the Counter with David Chang
programme.desc: Behind The Counter With Dave Chang: The Spring Menu - An unfiltered behind-the-scenes look into David Chang's kitchen as he and his team develop and practice a unique menu in the days leading up to the next Netflix episode of Dinner Time Live. This episode sees Dave working on a Springtime inspired menu for guests Maya Rudolph and Ron Funchess. Dishes include: pea and mint soup, truffled egg toast, crab cakes with warmed artichoke and ramp salad, and roast lamb chops with spätzle and braised morels.

programme.title: Behind the Counter with David Chang

This episode sees Dave working on a "Classic Comfort Foods" menu for NBA legends Reggie Miller and Mark Jackson. Dishes include: Caesar salad, New England clam chowder, fettuccine alfredo, salmon with caper-butter sauce, a potato rösti, and a chocolate tart.

programme.title: Cooking School

programme.title: Cooking School
programme.desc: Cooking School - David Chang Makes 5 Easy Recipes Using His New Korean BBQ Sauces: David Chang shows off some of his favorite ways to use his new Momofuku Korean BBQ Sauces, including a vinaigrette salad dressing that he makes two different salads for, a simple beef & broccoli recipe, Dakdoritang (spicy chicken stew), Gamja Jorim (Korean braised potatoes), and a deliciously easy steak sauce.

programme.title: Cooking School
programme.desc: "Brandon Jew's "MSG" Fried Chicken" - Chef Brandon Jew, owner of Michelin-starred Mr. Jiu's in San Francisco's Chinatown, shares his recipe and techniques for making his "MSG" (mushroom/seaweed/garlic) Fried Chicken, inspired by the original fried chicken recipe from his grandfather's restaurant, The Four Seas.

programme.title: Cooking School

programme.title: Tasting History with Max Miller
programme.desc: Max reveals that sugar plums are sugar-coated confections, not fruit, tracing their history from 1600s England to the Victorian era, including use as medicine and cannonball names. He recreates an 1865 cherry sugar plum recipe, showing the 3-day process of drying cherries, coating with gum arabic and sugar syrup, and adding color for the final treat.

programme.title: Tasting History with Max Miller
programme.desc: Max explores lighthouse keeper life via an 1881 provisioning list and period recipes. He covers the isolated, demanding job—cleaning Fresnel lenses with mercury, trimming wicks, and cooking with limited supplies like flour, beans, and salt pork. Featuring keepers Henry Long, Mary Ryan, and Hannah Thomas, he recreates Fannie Farmer’s 1896 Boston corn chowder with pilot bread.

programme.title: Tasting History with Max Miller
programme.desc: Max explores Alcatraz’s surprisingly good food program (1934–1963) via a Women’s Club cookbook. He covers Warden Johnston’s use of nutrition for order, the mess hall as a riot risk, coveted kitchen jobs, and the 1950 “Spaghetti Riot.” He recreates stuffed pork chops, evaporated milk cucumber salad, and quickie apple pie—better than most U.S. prisons’ meals.

programme.title: Tasting History with Max Miller
programme.desc: Max explores D-Day meals, from pre-invasion steak and lemon meringue pie to the pivotal breakfast of eggs and bacon, K rations, D bars, and British 24-hour assault packs. He covers seasickness, paratroopers trading chocolate for eggs, and 48-hour hunger gaps, featuring stories from USS LCI 94 skipper “Popeye” and soldiers miming chicken for eggs.

programme.title: Tasting History with Max Miller
programme.desc: Max recreates ancient Sumerian beer using the 4,000-year-old *Hymn to Ninkasi*, detailing a week-long process with soaked barley, bappir bread, malting, crushing, and fermentation with aromatics and date syrup. He explores beer varieties, tavern laws, its role in commerce, and mythology like the drunken tale of Enki and Inanna. The nutty, effervescent brew lasts 2–3 days.

programme.title: Sara's Weeknight Meals
programme.desc: Sara dives into Chinese heritage at Chinatowns on either side of the continent. In Vancouver, recipes for appetizers cooked with Chinese tea and Dim Sum made by an opera singing Chinese local. Then – a lesson in making Chinese dumplings. Back at home, Wok Queen Grace Young describes her efforts to preserve New York's Chinatown as she and Sara make a BBQ Pork and Yangchow fried rice.

programme.title: Sara's Weeknight Meals
programme.desc: Holidays are when Sara pulls out the stops when it comes to sweets and desserts. Try her Glazed Pears and shortbread pecan praline, or the surprising twist on potstickers filled with dried plum and apricots. On Ask Sara, tips on blind baking a pie crust. Then a favorite food gift in Sara's family - homemade Chocolate Peppermint Bark.

programme.title: Sara's Weeknight Meals
programme.desc: In Naples, Sara unlocks the secret recipe for the best Neapolitan pizza at the famous Gino Sorbillos. Fried meat filled pizza may be even better than that, or is the best one a unique star shaped pizza? Just across the bay in Sorrento it's all lemons, all the time as Sara visits a proud family of lemon growers. They make a citrus flecked cheese and Grandma's Lemon Pasta.

programme.title: Sara's Weeknight Meals
programme.desc: Parma, Italy is home to Parmesan cheese, Prosciutto di Parma and some of the best tomatoes in Italy. All three go into a dish Sara cooks with a local chef. You won't find a quicker weeknight meal than his fancy sounding Tagliatelle con Crema di Parmigiana Passata. Sara's Parsley and Asparagus salad makes it a meal. Later, Sara cooks with Italian American chef Joey Campanaro.

programme.title: Sara's Weeknight Meals
programme.desc: How do you make any dish even more delicious? Just add cheese! To prove the point Sara's got two recipes: a French Onion Soup Burger topped with melty, gooey cheese and an equally gooey Alsatian Onion Pie with caramelized onions and melted Gruyere that puts it over the top. Later, we visit a dairy farm and then on 'Ask Sara', an easy homemade ricotta.

programme.title: Sara's Weeknight Meals
programme.desc: Sara's strategy for easy weeknight cooking? Simply cook a dish one night, then repurpose it into a different meal for another night. Maya Kaimal joins Sara to make Turkey Keema with sweet potatoes and ground meat. On another night, that morphs into Indian stuffed peppers. Then Sara Sautee's Duck Breasts for a quick meal. She uses those same Duck Breasts in a mouthwatering Peking Duck Wrap.

programme.title: Sara's Weeknight Meals
programme.desc: Sara visits the romantic Greek island of Santorini to sip local wine on the edge of the Caldera. Then she joins a local chef to make Greek salad, Tzatziki and Shrimp Saganaki. In Vancouver, Sara learns their secrets of the coveted Spot Prawn from a Vancouver fisherman, then joins a friend to make Spot Prawn Risotto.

programme.title: Sara's Weeknight Meals
programme.desc: Fish is on the menu when Sara joins Greek Chef Maria Loi harborside near Athens to cook lemony, crispy skinned Branzino along with Beet, Beans and Feta Salad and Lemon Potatoes. Then it's off to Athen's Central Market to buy Retsina at a famous tavern for a rooftop mezze party in the shadow of the Acropolis. Back at home, Sara uses canned sardines for a quick and easy pantry taco.

programme.title: Sara's Weeknight Meals
programme.desc: Sara kicks off with a street food tour in Rome led by American Ex Pat Katie Parla. Then, they perform a Roman hat trick – three pastas starting with the same delicious base: Gricia made with guanciale transforms into Amatriciana by adding tomatoes or Carbonara by adding eggs. In her own kitchen, Sara makes baked penne with prosciutto and Fontina cheese.

programme.title: Sara's Weeknight Meals
programme.desc: Sara's on the Spanish island of Mallorca, where an ancient olive grove tended by sheep is the magical setting for cooking a hunters stew over an open fire. Back home, Sara makes Seafood Gazpacho. On 'Ask Sara', she answers a viewer's questions about Lemons.

programme.title: Life on Mar's: The Home Makeover Show
programme.desc: We're celebrating 40! 40 original episodes, that is. So Mar’s looking back at three full seasons of Casual Luxury designs. Our favorite moments and yours. Join Mar and the Team on this very special episode as we look back at many of the places, characters, fun, makeovers and trips that make the series special—plus a rare look at the very beginning and some new reveals, too. Celebrate with us!

programme.title: Life on Mar's: The Home Makeover Show
programme.desc: Mar takes Mary Alice—new to Westport—and he just sold her a new condo. He takes her through his Casual Luxury transformation of her new condo step-by-step. Remove walls? Check! Add rooms? Check! Take some risks? Check! A total renovation that requires many hands—and dancing feet—to get to the finish line. But what will she think?

programme.title: Life on Mar's: The Home Makeover Show
programme.desc: Mary Alice's new condo has gone through many changes on each floor and in every room. Removing walls and adding space has revealed a Casual Luxury environment. After months of renovations and many design decisions, it's time to finally reveal to Mary Alice her new Wonderland. With so much at stake, it's fingers crossed!

programme.title: Life on Mar's: The Home Makeover Show
programme.desc: This home on Punch Bowl Drive in Westport is spacious in every way—except the kitchen. Stuck in its 1970's profile, it feels cramped and ready for a renovation. Mar redesigns this dated kitchen to meet the needs of a 21st-century family. Every bit of space is meticulously reworked with Casual Luxury for function and entertaining.

programme.title: Life on Mar's: The Home Makeover Show
programme.desc: There is no place like home but with a break in the design schedule, there's time for an upgrade. So Mar is finally addressing his primary bedroom (and bathroom) at his home Rosebrook Gardens. With space at a premium, how will the wish list for a wall of jaw-dropping built-in closets and more be possible? It's gonna take more than a Casual Luxury design to create the perfect space.

programme.title: Life on Mar's: The Home Makeover Show
programme.desc: After Mar finishes his Primary Bedroom reveal to the team they finally see the new primary bath—the oasis of his dreams, an extraordinary use of the space. It's the perfect complement to his new bedroom and brand new built-in storage. Watch his journey renovating his en suite in Casual Luxury style.

programme.title: Life on Mar's: The Home Makeover Show
programme.desc: Mar's real estate business is booming and the MARket is hot! When he lists a charming, renovated 1880's home, the family is already out—and so are their furnishings. So he creates Casual Luxury from room to room as usual, this time with a staging partner to help transform the space. Does he get the offers he expects?

programme.title: Life on Mar's: The Home Makeover Show
programme.desc: After selling a client's home in Westport, CT, Mar is asked to design their new New York City apartment. The catch? It has to be completed in under 24 hours! From move in to unpacking to staging….the clock is ticking and the client will be back soon—does Casual Luxury work in the Big Apple and in a time crunch?

programme.title: Life on Mar's: The Home Makeover Show
programme.desc: Paul gets a new client call from people who have just downsized. Their new place is great—except for odd layouts and wasted space. They want Mar's magic touch while they are traveling. Not a small project: a total kitchen and primary bedroom & bath demo and reno in less than a month. Can Mar create the perfect space without the client present? Will they love Mar's Casual Luxury designs?

programme.title: Life on Mar's: The Home Makeover Show
programme.desc: Mar continues his rush reno while clients are away. Primary bedroom and bathroom, plus a kitchen—without the client present. A lot is going right—but will it be what they really expect? Despite Mar's award-winning design eye, when the clients return, how highly will they rate these Casual Luxury results?

programme.title: Life on Mar's: The Home Makeover Show
programme.desc: A year in the making! Mar goes rogue using short amounts of time between projects this season and decides to do a complete Casual Luxury backyard and Garden Studio redesign and renovation at his own home. With Paul banned from being on the property, can he sneak a peek before the big reveal to Mar's guests? (Stay tuned for a last minute surprise!)

programme.title: Life on Mar's: The Home Makeover Show
programme.desc: Sometimes Mar has to hide things from viewers, but not this episode! This special edition is a true behind-the-scenes of season 4: Oops we can't believe it happened; Yikes, we're showing you; and New: some scenes that didn't quite make it to air. Exclusive, hand-selected, and fun moments you won't see anywhere else. Mar says 'Keep it casual'—if he can keep a straight face.

programme.title: Life on Mar's: The Home Makeover Show
programme.desc: Mar has known the Breslin family a long time now—first as home buyers, then as clients, soon as friends, and now as extended family. Union House has evolved with their needs (and with casual luxury), but one last detail remains: the built—but empty—pool house. It needs to be a jewel in time for the summer—and if it's done Mar will get to have a dog-gone party for puppy Clover!

programme.title: Life on Mar's: The Home Makeover Show
programme.desc: Tis the season to be MARry! Join Mar and the team for a wonderful and meaningful celebration at Rosebrook Gardens. Wondrously creative holiday touches are everywhere you look, both inside and out. Join the crowds of people who want to come and see for themselves. Treat yourself to lights, decorations, carolers, and lots of good cheer, all done the Casual Luxury way.

programme.title: Life on Mar's: The Home Makeover Show
programme.desc: The O'Kane family's patience is truly tested during a complete to-the-studs kitchen renovation. Homeowner Yvonne starts to get impatient to feed her family home cooked dinners. Added pressure: another fireplace to deal with, uneven floors, custom cabinets and an uncovered secret staircase. (All that plus a new puppy.) Thanks to Mar's 6 design principles this custom space is unique and stunning.

programme.title: The Super Simple Show - Counting and Numbers
programme.desc: The Super Simple show is a compilation of Super Simple’s most popular songs and series that our fans love! This compilation is all about Numbers and Counting! Includes children's song favorites "10 Little Buses", “10 In the Bed” & "10 Little Dinosaurs" and featuring Carl's Car Wash, The Bumble Nums, Sing Along With Tobee, and More!

programme.title: Where Is Baby? - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Peekaboo! Sing along with this adorable song for kids, “Where Is Baby?” Where is baby? Where is baby? Where is baby? There he is.

programme.title: Finny's First Day Of School - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Finny is a bit nervous on the first day of school, but Myrtle the Turtle is even more anxious and literally hides her shell! Surely Myrtle will come out of her shell when their teacher, a whale named Mr. Magellan, has them draw and present their favorite things to the class! Nope. Myrtle is even more nervous than ever! Being a good friend, Finny helps Myrtle through her anxiety, and the tiny turtle finally shows her drawing to everyone.

programme.title: Baby Shark - Finny The Shark and more
programme.desc: Baby Shark, Mama Shark, Papa Shark, Grandma Shark, and Grandpa Shark are out for a family swim and Baby Shark tries and tries to catch the little fishies but his skills aren’t yet up to the task. Just when he thinks he finally has them a (very big) friend of the little fishies steps in to save the day!

programme.title: Dharma's Digger - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Oh no! While digging deep at a top secret construction site, Dhama’s digger gets splashed with smelly sludge! Everyone says that Carl's Car Wash is the place to get all cleaned up, so Dharma skedaddles over to see how Carl can help. With a quick mess assessment and a few twists of some knobs, Carl’s suds-sational car wash is ready to give Dharma’s vehicle a good scrub-a-dub! Dharma rolls out one happy customer, and ready to get back to work on the site that Carl is itching to see!

programme.title: Mr. Golden Sun - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Mister Sun, Sun, Mr. Golden Sun...please shine down on me! It’s the Mr. Sun song from Super Simple Songs!

programme.title: Finny's First Sleepover - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: It’s Finny’s first sleepover and Finny is nervous to sleep at Myrtle the Turtle’s house. Throughout the night, Finny becomes more and more comfortable and after a spooky story, Finny becomes the bravest of everyone at the sleepover! Finny can't wait to do a sleepover again – but this time, at Finny’s house!

programme.title: Enchanted Ice Cream - Super Simple
programme.desc: Today, the Bumble Nums are going to make Enchanted Ice Cream Sundaes! With a map in hand, Humble, Grumble, and Stumble search the orchard for the secret ingredient … and discover a fairy treehouse leading to an enchanted world! The Bumble Nums travel through the portal…but do they find the ingredient they’re looking for? And can they get it back to the kitchen in time for the Cooking Countdown? Watch and see!

programme.title: Hello Hello! - Super Simple Puppets and more
programme.desc: Sing and dance along with the Super Simple Puppets to “Hello Hello!”! It’s a classic Super Simple action song for kids.

programme.title: Erupting Raspberry Lava Cake - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: The Bumble Nums are making an Erupting Raspberry Lava Cake but the secret ingredient is at the top of Mount Fruity Volcano! Can Humble, Grumble, and Stumble climb the volcano and get what they need before it blows? And can they do it in time for the Cooking Countdown? Watch and see!

programme.title: Let's Go For A Drive! - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Get in on the fun and join Milo in his pretend car for a quick ride. Do you see the ducks crossing the road? How about people walking on the sidewalk? Wait, don't cross on a red light!

programme.title: The Pinocchio - Sing Along With Tobee - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Caitie made a fluffy bird marionette named Fifi! Fifi is full of jokes and Tobee can't stop laughing! Caitie knows another marionette who is just as silly as Fifi. It's Pinocchio! There's even a whole song about him called "The Pinocchio." After Caitie and Tobee sing and dance to the song, Fifi can't help but tell one last joke. And guess what? It quacks Tobee up!

programme.title: Little Billy's Skateboard - Carl's Car Wash and more
programme.desc: The Bubblegum Bandit pulls another bubblegum burglary and is about to escape when Officer Oona bursts his bubble! Moments later, little Billy skates right into the action and his skateboard becomes a gummy mess! Billy hurries to Carl’s Car Wash, but Carl won't clean his skateboard - it's a CAR wash, not a SKATEBOARD wash! Billy does some quick thinking...and his skateboard might just go through the car wash after all!

programme.title: 10 Little Dinosaurs - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: 10 Stegosauruses! 10 Triceratopses! 10 Pterodactyls! 10 Brontosauruses! And 10 Tyrannosaurus Rex! Wow! This Super Simple counting song introduces the numbers 1-10 and also some very cool dinosaur names! Can you say them all?!

programme.title: Steve's Street Sweeper - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Steve the Street Sweeper is cleaning the street when garbage splatters all over the side of his truck! He doesn't want a dirty truck, so Steve races to Carl’s Car Wash! With a quick mess assessment and a few twists of some knobs, Carl’s suds-sational car wash is ready to give Steve's vehicle a good scrub-a-dub! Steve leaves one happy customer, and is ready to get back to sweeping rubbish.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett goes to Venice, Italy with a mask for Luca to wear at his masquerade party. Jett and Luca set out on a gondola to deliver the invitations, but when they run into a waterway traffic jam, Paul must show up to unclog the canal traffic.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Princess Maribelle from England asks for sparkly collars for her puppies to wear at her royal tea party. When the puppies escape and run every which way through the garden, Jett and Jerome join forces to round them up.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Riley from Hollywood is directing his first action film. Jett brings an alien mask and ends up acting as the monster. Riley’s demands get out of hand, so Jerome comes to co-star and help him bring about a peaceful ending.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett takes a pair of running shoes that light up to Lorna in Kenya. She’s going to run in a big race. While training she crosses paths with a lost baby wildebeast. Bello comes to play a game and reunite the baby with its parents.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett has a feathered headdress for Camila from Brazil. She’s dancing the samba in a Carnival parade. Jerome comes to help her with her dance moves and Jett uses his Jett Speed to fix Camila’s float when it suffers a breakdown.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Drew in Canada asks for ice skates so that he can play on an ice hockey team. When he gets to the rink he’s so nervous that he can’t play. Former Mountie Grand Albert gives Drew confidence-boosting tips so he can score the big goal.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Yuri from Russia is part of a family circus. He needs a unicycle for his act on the high wire. The rest of the family is on their way when the circus train breaks down. Jerome performs an amazing act for the crowd while Jett goes to help them.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Karl from Norway asks for a Viking helmet. He goes to Viking Camp where Jett is mistaken for a dragon. The campers chase Jett onto a ship that heads for a waterfall. Mira comes and pushes them away from disaster.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Martine in Paris, France needs a cake-decorating machine. Her father the baker asks her to ice a giant cake for a party at the Eiffel Tower. When the cake is ready the traffic is terrible. Dizzy flies the cake through the sky over the city.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Vietnamese sisters Sen and Kim are fans of pop star Kellie. They ask for wigs like the one their idol wears. When Kellie’s van gets stuck in a rice paddy, Dizzy comes to lead the way to the concert and the sisters are Kellie’s special guests.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett takes brushes to Willem in The Netherlands who is going to paint a mural on a sea wall. When the mural is almost done, a storm approaches. Jett and Donnie borrow the propeller from a windmill to dry the painting before it is ruined.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jerome thinks Jett’s job is easy so he takes his place. He delivers a bathtub to Nayan in Thailand. Boonying the elephant takes a bath but is startled by a spray of water and runs off. Jett arrives to help bring Boonying back.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett carries tires to Alex and his sister Adriana in Monaco. They’ve built a hot dog car for Alex to ride in a soapbox derby. When ducks cause him to run off the course and into town, Paul comes and leads him back with a police escort.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett brings a battery to Noah in Denmark, who’s built a dinosaur out of plastic blocks. When they power it up the dinosaur escapes and runs through the town. Donnie comes and builds another robot to confront the dinosaur and remove his battery.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett brings a microphone to Ruby, a girl in Australia who hosts her own nature program. She interviews animals until a kangaroo snatches her microphone. Bello comes and plays leapfrog with the kangaroo and Ruby gets it all on tape.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett brings a magician’s hat to Moritz in Austria, who is performing an act with his pet rabbit. As a finale, he will make a piano disappear. The naughty rabbit causes the piano to roll out of the theater. Dizzy comes and uses Rescue Ropes to keep the piano from falling into the Danube River and returns it to the theater for the final trick.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett brings a fireman’s hat to Stefan in Germany. His dad is a fireman and is coming to school to tell everyone about his job. But a fire breaks out and the fire truck runs out of water. Donnie uses a fountain as a giant shower head, attaching it to a hose and tapping into underground springs to bring enough water to save the day.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: World Music introduces you and your little one to beautiful sounds from every continent, bringing a fresh, new experience of music and culture. Sing, dance and play to exotic rhythms that open the door to an appreciation of different cultures from around the world.

programme.title: Baby Einstein New Classics
programme.desc: Learn all about music and rhythm in the world around us! Discover classical music and learn instrument names through narration and repetition. Inspire sweet dreams with gentle melodies and a comforting bedtime story. Learn about classical music from Beethoven, Bach, and Mozart. Sing and dance along to classic rhythmic songs like The Wheels on the Bus and see real-life images of instruments.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: Dive in with your little explorer across the seas to meet amazing animals living in the ocean, coral reef, and polar regions. Overflowing with underwater footage of whales, dolphins, tropical fish, and more, Neptune's Oceans invites you and your baby on an oceanic voyage of discovery!

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: As babies develop, their understanding of the world, and how its pieces "fit" together, continues to progress. DISCOVERING SHAPES playfully introduces five basic forms circle, oval, triangle, square and rectangle as each appears in the context of toys, nature and everyday objects.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: At 12 months, babies can identify specific sounds, and they re also starting to match the sounds they hear with the objects that make them. Meet the Orchestra -- First Instruments presents your little "maestro" with a playful introduction to the sights and sounds of a real orchestra -- from the clashing of cymbals to the purring of the cello and everything in between!

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: From the moment babies are born, they use their developing senses to discover the world. In terms of sight, bold patterns in contrasting colors or black and white are initially preferred. As for sounds, Mother s gentle voice, in any language, is music to baby's ears. Language Nursery: Voices From Many Lands acquaints your baby with the sounds of foreign language by presenting delightful, visually stimulating images accompanied by spoken passages, natural sounds and music.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: As babies grow and change, so does the landscape around them. From fiery red leaves to falling snowflakes; from flowers in bloom to fireworks in July, every season of the year has its own special magic just waiting to be discovered.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Ocean Explorers
programme.desc: Cal, Neptune, Opus, Dean, Tinker and others learn about the flora and fauna of the ocean through STEAM-based principles and real-life footage.

programme.title: The Sandbox
programme.desc: The Sandbox is where our favorite Baby Einstein characters gather to play, problem-solve and have fun. Each five-minute episode explores an area of curiosity relevant to our 2-4 year old audience. Since the four weathered planks of wood that make up the structure of their sandbox are no obstacles for their imaginations, the entire universe is available to them for each new adventure.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: Perhaps the sweetest sounds you'll ever hear are the babbles and coos that one day become ma-ma, da-da and I love you. Besides being music to your ears, these baby steps of language change everything as your little one discovers an exciting, powerful new way of relating to the world! Baby's First Sounds invites both of you to share these memorable moments: those precious ''firsts'' that come around once in your baby's lifetime.

programme.title: Baby Einstein New Classics
programme.desc: Isn't the world exciting?! Learn about things found in nature like flowers, grass, trees, and leaves with real-life footage and narration. Sing-along to popular nursery rhymes and learn about common bedtime themes. Teach baby how to say words like eat, milk, and all done verbally and through sign language. Discover words and activities about playtime and friendship.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: Within the first year of babies' lives, their physical development begins to kick into high gear as they explore ways to physically interact with the world around them. BABY'S FIRST MOVES is a joyful celebration of their movement milestones -- including first steps, clapping, jumping, dancing and more.

programme.title: Transformex - Futuristic Cartoon Vehicles for Children
programme.desc: Welcome to the world of Trasnformex,a group of cartoon vehicles from the future that have the super hero abilty to transform themselves to any car or truck they like. The most popular transformations include: tractor, crane, bulldozer, police car, ambulance. fire engine, tow turck, submarine, loader, digger and more. All of your toddlers favorite toys in one place!

programme.title: Baby Shark - Nursery Rhymes & Kids Songs
programme.desc: The classic nursery rhyme Baby Shark! Dance along with Bounce Baby Shark song. In this video you kids will find a lot of your most favorite nursery rhymes and kids songs.

programme.title: Wheels On The Bus and More Kids Songs - Super Supremes
programme.desc: Wheels on the Bus is a nursery rhyme that little babies love! Come join the Super Supremes as they sing and dance in this fun kids educational video with our version of the classic Wheels on the Bus called The Wheels on the Bus and many more preschool rhymes for babies like: This is the Way, Sharing is Caring, Zoo Song, Incy Wincy Spider and more.

programme.title: Super Supremes Wheels On The Bus & More Popular Kids Song
programme.desc: Do you kids know Wheels on the Bus? Learn this classic nursery rhyme with The Supremes, plus many other fun songs and dances.

programme.title: Comedy Cartoon Shows for Children - Panda a Panda
programme.desc: What's your pandatude? Welcome to the world of two moody but hysterical pandas - On On & Guy Guy, who always seem to get into unfortunate mishaps as they navigate their relatable but surreal world. Their ordinary everyday situations often go awry in hilarious ways to become extraordinary. A short form silent slapstick comedy series, Panda a Panda will appeal to both kids as well as adults.

programme.title: Twinkle Twinkle Little Star & More Kids Songs - Bob The Train
programme.desc: Enjoy Bob the Train's nursery rhymes for babies and toddlers! Learn about animal sounds, shapes, and more!

programme.title: Kids TV Nursery Rhymes
programme.desc: Nursery rhymes, baby videos and kids songs that your kindergartener can sing and dance to all day long! Enjoy this first of many hour-long collections of Kids TV's most popular hit animations. Kids TV introduces your toddlers to a variety of classic nursery rhymes as well as original kids songs for a wholesome and fun way to learn the basics of life. See you inside!

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Professor Von Schlemmer (from Too Tall Tails) has created a machine which brings dreams to life. When Robotnik hears about it, he forces the Professor to alter the machine so that nightmares come to life.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Robotnik plans to block out the sun and extinguish all life and nature on the planet Mobius. Then he creates a robot son and tries to train him in the ways of wickedness.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Robotnik invents an electron altering generator which makes Scratch and Grounder twice as fast as Sonic. When they lose it and Tails picks it up, Tails speeds through the Mobius countryside leaving disasters and accidents in his wake.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: In Part II, Sonic and Sally steal the Roboti-sizer plans, stop the Destroyer from polluting the Great Forest and save Little Sonic, Little Sally and Dulcy's mother, Sabina.
